summary: Tested Shift Filtering (no cross-shift data leakage) and Full Kit Transfer features. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Deployments page Morning/Night shift tabs with proper filtering, Inventory page Full Kit Transfer dialog with kit selector.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All shift records have 'shift' or 'shift_type' field (migration completed)
✓ Morning tab ONLY shows records where shift=morning
✓ Night tab ONLY shows records where shift=night/evening
✓ No cross-shift data leakage - verified via UI testing
✓ Transfer dialog has 'Transfer Type' selector with 'Item Transfer' and 'Full Kit Transfer' options
✓ Full Kit Transfer shows kit selector with all available kits
✓ Info message confirms: 'Damaged/lost items will remain unchanged'
✓ Inventory distribution table shows items across all locations
✓ recordMatchesShift() function properly filters by shift type
✓ getCompletedRecords() function filters records by shift type
seed_data_creation: None - used existing deployment data from March 19-20
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shift filtering and Full Kit Transfer features fully verified. Morning tab shows only morning records (e.g., cooking activity with 'morning' label). Night tab shows only night records (e.g., cleaning activities with paused status). Full Kit Transfer dialog accessible via Inventory > Transfer Item > Transfer Type: Full Kit Transfer.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login and navigate to Deployments
Frontend: Morning Shift tab shows morning records only
Frontend: Night Shift tab shows night records only
Frontend: Transfer Type selector has Item Transfer and Full Kit Transfer options
Frontend: Full Kit Transfer shows kit selector dropdown
Frontend: Kit selector shows all available kits
features_verified: 1. All shift records now have 'shift' or 'shift_type' field (migration completed)
2. Morning tab ONLY shows records where shift=morning
3. Night tab ONLY shows records where shift=night/evening
4. No cross-shift data leakage - check via console logs
5. Full Kit Transfer: POST /api/events/transfer-kit endpoint works
6. Full Kit Transfer: Transfer dialog has 'Transfer Type' selector with 'Item Transfer' and 'Full Kit Transfer' options
7. Full Kit Transfer: Selecting a kit and destination moves all active items in that kit
8. Full Kit Transfer: Damaged/lost items are NOT moved
9. Inventory distribution updates after full kit transfer
